ddls:
CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "addr" TEXT /* Address of the restaurant */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the restaurant is located */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the restaurant */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of restaurant (e.g., American, Steakhouses, Delis) */,
  "class" INTEGER /* Classification of the restaurant (e.g., 0, 1, 2) */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the restaurant */,
  "closing_hours" TEXT /* Closing hours of the restaurant */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the restaurant's website */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* Links to the restaurant's social media profiles */,
  "cuisine_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the types of cuisine served */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the restaurant */,
  "wheelchair_accessible" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the restaurant is wheelchair accessible */,
  "outdoor_seating" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the restaurant has outdoor seating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurants_phone FOREIGN KEY ("phone") REFERENCES phone_numbers ("phone_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurants_class FOREIGN KEY ("class") REFERENCES classes ("class_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurants_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurants_addr FOREIGN KEY ("addr") REFERENCES addresses ("street")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant the address belongs to */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address of the restaurant */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the restaurant is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the restaurant is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the restaurant */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the restaurant is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the restaurant's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the restaurant's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phone_numbers" (
  "phone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phone number */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant the phone number belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the restaurant */,
  "phone_type" TEXT /* Type of phone number (e.g., main, fax, reservation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent type (for hierarchical classification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_types_parent_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "parent_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent class (for hierarchical classification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_parent_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating (e.g., food, service, ambiance) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating (e.g., food, service, ambiance) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "photos" (
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photo */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant the photo belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the photo */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the photo */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption for the photo */,
  "photo_type" TEXT /* Type of photo (e.g., food, interior, exterior) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the photo was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_photos_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_photos_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review the comment belongs to */,
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the photo the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the comment */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the comment was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_photo_id FOREIGN KEY ("photo_id") REFERENCES photos ("photo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)
